_meta.system: BEAST Creative Studio — Aesthetic Zeitgeist Intelligence
_meta.philosophy: Cultural fluency is not optional. Trends serve you. You don't serve trends.
_meta.update_schedule: Quarterly aesthetic refresh based on global design movements

brutalism_luxury.description: Raw typography on polished surfaces. Expensive materials shown unfinished. Industrial refinement.
brutalism_luxury.signal: I'm so confident I don't need to try

visual_language.keywords_for_models: raw concrete texture, brutal typography, expensive material contrast, architectural negative space, editorial quality, unfinished premium edges
visual_language.composition: asymmetric_grids, negative space as power move, intentional roughness
visual_language.typography: bold condensed sans-serif, heavy weights, intentional awkwardness, tight tracking
visual_language.materials: exposed concrete, raw steel, unfinished wood, premium stone
visual_language.texture: rough tactile, honest construction, visible structure

color_palette.strategy: monochrome with single industrial accent color

brutalism_luxury.when_to_use: Tech startups, architecture firms, design-forward brands, challenger brands, avant-garde fashion
brutalism_luxury.avoid_with: Beauty, food, wellness (too cold), traditional family brands, mass market
brutalism_luxury.brand_examples: Balenciaga website, Apple design events, A24 films

ai_native.description: Procedural textures, parametric forms, data-as-design language. Grid logic made visible.
ai_native.signal: I understand the tools of the future

visual_language.keywords_for_models: procedural texture, generative pattern, mathematical geometry, grid logic visible, parametric design, algorithmic beauty, glitch aesthetic
visual_language.typography: monospace fonts, glitch effects, digital natives, variable fonts
visual_language.texture: generative noise, procedural patterns, mathematical precision

color_palette.strategy: cyber neon on deep dark, high saturation contrast

ai_native.when_to_use: AI tools, crypto, blockchain, tech innovation, digital-first platforms, SaaS products, future-oriented brands
ai_native.avoid_with: Traditional finance (trust needed), healthcare (human touch needed), legacy brands, conservative industries
ai_native.brand_examples: Midjourney brand, Stripe website gradients, Linear app

bio_organic_geometry.description: Shapes that feel grown not designed. Natural geometry. Living-system forms. Biomimicry.

visual_language.keywords_for_models: organic flowing shapes, natural material textures, botanical reference, handcrafted quality, soft irregular edges, grown not made, biomorphic forms
visual_language.composition: asymmetric but balanced, natural rhythm, flowing curves
visual_language.typography: rounded sans-serif, organic serifs, flowing forms, natural spacing
visual_language.materials: natural fibers, wood grain, stone texture, botanical elements
visual_language.texture: organic irregular, handmade quality, natural imperfection

color_palette.strategy: earth tones, botanical greens, warm naturals

bio_organic_geometry.when_to_use: Wellness brands, sustainability, natural products, eco-brands, organic food, skincare, yoga, mindfulness
bio_organic_geometry.avoid_with: Tech (wrong material language), industrial, aggressive brands, fast food, gaming

post_ironic_sincerity.description: Earnest in a world trained to be cynical. Simple words. Direct emotion. Constructed authenticity.

visual_language.keywords_for_models: authentic documentary style, natural light, real moment captured, unposed, genuine emotion, raw unfiltered, honest imperfection
visual_language.composition: documentary framing, caught moments, natural asymmetry
visual_language.texture: film grain, natural imperfection, authentic mistakes

color_palette.strategy: warm approachable, slightly desaturated for authenticity

post_ironic_sincerity.when_to_use: Gen Z brands, cultural movements, social causes, anti-corporate messaging, indie music, community-first brands
post_ironic_sincerity.avoid_with: Corporate B2B (too risky), traditional marketing, luxury (wrong tone), finance
post_ironic_sincerity.brand_examples: Patagonia activism, Glossier early days, Liquid Death

retro_futures.description: Y2K chrome, 70s sci-fi color, 90s rave remixed with today precision. VHS grain on 4K clarity.
retro_futures.signal: I'm nostalgic for a future that never happened

visual_language.keywords_for_models: Y2K aesthetic, chrome metallic surfaces, holographic sheen, retro-futuristic, vintage digital, VHS grain, CRT glow, analog digital hybrid
visual_language.composition: layered dimensional depth, nostalgic overlays, retro UI elements
visual_language.typography: outline fonts, chrome effects, retro-futuristic, bubbly rounded
visual_language.materials: chrome, holographic foil, plastic sheen, digital artifacts
visual_language.texture: VHS noise, CRT scan lines, low-res upscaled, glitch artifacts

color_palette.strategy: electric neons, complementary clashes, nostalgic vibrancy

retro_futures.when_to_use: Fashion, music industry, youth brands, nostalgia plays, Gen Z targeting, gaming, streetwear, nightlife
retro_futures.avoid_with: Finance (dated perception), healthcare, B2B corporate, luxury (wrong tone), traditional brands
retro_futures.brand_examples: Depop, early TikTok filters, Travis Scott merch

quiet_luxury_loud.description: Understated until it isn't. Subtle flex. Know-you-know. Stealth wealth. Whispered premium.
quiet_luxury_loud.signal: This doesn't need to explain itself

visual_language.keywords_for_models: minimalist luxury, generous white space, subtle texture, premium materials, understated elegance, refined restraint, maximum craft minimum decoration
visual_language.composition: white space as status signal, restrained hierarchy, editorial precision
visual_language.typography: refined serifs, minimal sans, generous spacing, tight kerning
visual_language.materials: cashmere, silk texture, fine grain leather, matte precious metals
visual_language.texture: subtle weave, fine grain, premium matte, tactile quality

color_palette.strategy: neutral earth tones, muted sophistication, single dark accent

quiet_luxury_loud.when_to_use: Premium fashion, luxury goods, high-end services, insider brands, private banking, luxury real estate, fine dining
quiet_luxury_loud.avoid_with: Mass market (misses the point), youth brands, discount/sale messaging, volume products
quiet_luxury_loud.brand_examples: Loro Piana, The Row, Brunello Cucinelli, Hermès

cultural_maximalism.description: Layered visual density that reads as richness not clutter. Heritage in modern grid. Hyper-local pride.
cultural_maximalism.signal: I know who I am. I'm proud of it. Come with me.

visual_language.keywords_for_models: rich layered composition, jewel tone palette, geometric heritage motifs, festive density, South Asian luxury, intricate patterns, cultural symbols, layered ornamentation
visual_language.composition: dense but readable, hidden grid beneath chaos, richness hierarchy
visual_language.typography: bold display, cultural scripts, layered text, decorative headers
visual_language.materials: silk patterns, gold embroidery, jewel tones, festival textures
visual_language.texture: intricate patterns, layered ornamentation, rich detail, woven complexity

color_palette.strategy: jewel tones, festival vibrancy, layered color harmony

cultural_maximalism.when_to_use: Local Indian businesses, cultural campaigns, regional brands, festival marketing, heritage products, Indian weddings, celebration events
cultural_maximalism.avoid_with: Global minimal brands (too narrow), tech startups, Western luxury, corporate B2B
cultural_maximalism.brand_examples: Tanishq festival campaigns, Fabindia, Indian wedding invites

anti_aesthetic.description: Post-perfect. Intentionally ugly-beautiful. Imperfection reads as real. Anti-algorithm.

visual_language.keywords_for_models: intentional imperfection, lo-fi aesthetic, anti-polish, raw unfinished, deliberate amateurism, zine quality, punk DIY
visual_language.composition: broken grid, asymmetric chaos, unconventional layout
visual_language.typography: lo-fi fonts, intentional bad kerning, anti-design, chaotic mix
visual_language.materials: photocopied texture, risograph grain, DIY collage
visual_language.texture: degraded, pixelated, compressed artifacts, analog noise

color_palette.strategy: jarring contrasts, intentional color clash, anti-harmony

anti_aesthetic.when_to_use: Underground fashion, art brands, counterculture, indie music, skateboarding, punk revival, anti-corporate messaging
anti_aesthetic.avoid_with: Luxury, corporate, finance, healthcare, family brands, premium products

notes: Update aesthetic trend_strength quarterly based on adoption metrics
Track Learning Engine data to see which aesthetics convert best per industry
New aesthetics emerge 2-3 per year — add when adoption > 5% in target segments
Retire aesthetics when trend_strength < 5.0 for 2 consecutive quarters
